item.title: 🍉 Hamza's Notes
item.description: My name is Hamza, and I'm a passionate Data Scientist with experience in incorporating AI models in systems.

item.title: Sketches
item.description: My personal art hobby In my free time I like to make illustrations and Graphic design! item.title: Awesome resources - ML and Beyond
item.description: Exploring resources into Data science and Beyond.

item.title: NLP from Sequential to Attention models
item.description: Introduction Large Language models demonstrated to be a standalone system, performing multiple text-based tasks like question-answering, text summarization, and chatbots, which is by the way a cool concept and making them statistically efficient, and building software on top of them is a lot easier ...

item.title: Spider Maps: Visualizing Clustered Networks
item.description: This article shares the story behind creating a custom map to visualize research center member locations.

item.title: Capacitated VRP of taxis service 🚖
item.description: Introduction The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) is a variant of the well-known Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) in which each vehicle has a limited capacity and the aim is to find the optimal routes for a fleet of vehicles to deliver goods to a set of customers while minimizing the total di...

item.title: Mobility Analytics with R
item.description: Hello, In this technical blog, we will explore the use of R for fleet mobility analytics.

item.title: Automated Data processing for metrics reporting
item.description: In today’s data-driven world, processing and reporting on data is a crucial aspect of making informed decisions.
